meta.title: Cookie Policy (ಕನ್ನಡ)
meta.description: ಕನ್ನಡ - How NavDhan uses cookies and similar technologies.

company.name: NavDhan
company.address: 156, Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka

intro.heading: Cookie Policy (ಕನ್ನಡ)
intro.body: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how NavDhan uses them, and the choices available to you.

sections.title: ಕನ್ನಡ
sections.body: ಕನ್ನಡ ಅನುವಾದ ಶೀಘ್ರದಲ್ಲಿ ಲಭ್ಯವಾಗಲಿದೆ. ಈ ಫೈಲ್ ಕನ್ನಡ ಸ್ಥಳೀಕರಣಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ಒಂದು ಪ್ಲೇಸ್‌ಹೋಲ್ಡರ್ ಆಗಿದೆ.

sections.title: What are cookies?
sections.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences, understand how you use it, and improve your experience.

table.caption: Cookies used on NavDhan
rows: Maintains your session and login state.
Helps us understand site usage anonymously.

sections.title: Third-party cookies
sections.body: We may allow trusted analytics and marketing partners to set cookies on our site. These partners are contractually bound to handle data responsibly.

items.heading: Browser settings
items.body: You can block or delete cookies through your browser settings.

items.heading: Consent banner
items.body: Our consent banner lets you accept or decline non-essential cookies.

items.heading: Impact
items.body: Disabling essential cookies may affect site functionality.

sections.title: Updates to this policy
sections.body: We may update this Cookie Policy. The latest version will always be available on this page.

contact.name: NavDhan Support
contact.address: 156, Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka

sections.title: Privacy Policy
sections.body: For more information on how we handle personal data, please read our Privacy Policy.
